entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop affected by virus diseases in the Asia-Pacific region

entities.name: VIRUS DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions caused by viruses that lead to economic losses in groundnut crops

entities.name: ASIA-PACIFIC REGION
entities.description: The geographical area where groundnut virus diseases are being managed and researched

entities.name: GROUNDNUT VIRUSES
entities.description: The viral organisms responsible for causing diseases in groundnut crops

entities.name: GENOME ORGANIZATION
entities.description: The structural arrangement of the genetic material in groundnut viruses

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut plants to withstand or prevent infection by virus diseases

entities.name: TRANSGENIC PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing groundnuts with introduced genes to provide resistance to virus diseases

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The continent where groundnut virus disease management strategies are being developed
